allow: Bash(node -e "require\(''dotenv''\).config\(\); const url = process.env.DATABASE_URL; const match = url.match\(/^\([^:]+\):\\/\\/\([^:]+\):\(.+\)@\(.+\)$/\); if\(match\) { console.log\(''protocol:'', match[1]\); console.log\(''user:'', match[2]\); console.log\(''host:'', match[4]\); } else { console.log\(''Could not parse URL''\); }")
